mapper.select: SELECT ac.* FROM ad_content ac INNER JOIN ad_position ap ON ac.position_id = ap.id WHERE ap.position_key = #{positionKey} AND ac.status = 1 AND (ac.start_time IS NULL OR ac.start_time <= NOW()) AND (ac.end_time IS NULL OR ac.end_time >= NOW()) ORDER BY ac.sort_order DESC
SELECT ac.*, ap.position_key FROM ad_content ac INNER JOIN ad_position ap ON ac.position_id = ap.id ORDER BY ac.position_id, ac.sort_order DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ad_content (position_id, title, image_url, link_url, sort_order, status, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{positionId}, #{title}, #{imageUrl}, #{linkUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
